Who We Are

Sharp Cuts.
Clean Confidence.

At Up With Hope Barbershop, we believe a great cut is more than style — it's confidence you carry everywhere. Located in the heart of Prosperita, Windhoek, we've built a space where precision, care, and community come together.

Every client sits in the chair and leaves looking their best. From tight fades to clean lineups, we bring skill and consistency to every single cut. No shortcuts. No compromises.

Precision Fades
Beard Grooming
Kids Welcome
Clean Environment
Friendly Barbers
Community First

What We Offer

Our Services

✂️
Adult Haircut

Full cut tailored to your shape and style. Fades, tapers, and everything in between — done right.

From N$ 80.00
👦
Kids Cut

Gentle, patient service for young clients. We make the chair a comfortable place for every kid.

From N$ 60.00
⚡
Trim & Taper

Quick shape-up to keep your look fresh between full cuts. Clean edges, sharp results.

From N$ 30.00
🧔
Beard Grooming

Define and sculpt your beard with precision. Clean lines, sharp fade-ins, and a groomed finish.

From N$ 20.00
